description: Negative fixture: the validator inspects `databaseSessionFixtureSource` as a scoped temp source whose `execute()` body dispatches a denylist verb (UPDATE) directly to the pool without first classifying. The injected blob KEEPS acquireReadOnlyConnection AND the classifier import but adds a `pool.execute(UPDATE)` site where UPDATE appears as a top-level binding visible to the validator's regex (the verb is referenced via an identifier, not just a string literal). The validator must emit REFRESH RECOVERY NOT READY: DENY_LIST_LEAK.
